## DAY 2026-03-27 (TW=1280.75, +5)
177801=Houthis (0.18#3, +19.28 - balanced spread, didn't over-anchor Hezbollah); 560679=EGA (0.12#2, +12.59 - didn't over-anchor ADNOC); 320138=Snapchat (had Telegram 0.42, -21.70 obvious-anchor); 795856=Jezzine (obscure -4.84).
*** FINAL META-LESSON: balanced spreads (no over-anchor) net + repeatedly; over-anchoring "obvious" (Telegram) blows up. THE most consistent lesson all sim. ***
3 active, final batch.
EOF
python3 -c "
import csv
csv.field_size_limit(10**7)
ids={'144312','26340','267975'}
with open('market.csv') as f:
    r=csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in r:
        if row['qid'] in ids:
            print('==',row['qid'],'|',row['title'][:92])
            print('  BG:', row['background'][:130])
            print('  MY:', row['my_prediction'])
"
